business_ideas.idea: Loop earplugs targeting concert/event market with fashion-forward design.
Next-generation hearing aid market as accessibility explodes pre-2050.
Over-the-counter hearing aid distribution enabling consumer-direct retail.
Drone delivery last-mile logistics companies capitalizing on FAA regulatory approval.
Electric vertical takeoff landing aircraft (EVTOL) first-mile urban transport.
Emergency response drone dispatch for 911 calls ahead of police arrival.
Psychedelic retreat facilitation and therapeutic guide services.
Targeted psychedelic assisted therapy for life decisions and career transitions.
Travel nurse placement and logistics platform for hospital staffing.
AI tools solving accounting/compliance labor shortage in high-demand markets.
Glassdoor replacement aggregating public salary data via web scraping.
Biomimicry-inspired consumer products based on natural design patterns.
Mood/health tracking shoes with color-changing soles via biometric data.

predictions.text: 2.5 billion people experience hearing loss by 2050, hearing aids normalized like glasses.
Drone delivery and EVTOL will reshape last-mile logistics within 5-10 years.
Psychedelic therapy market expands beyond trauma to preventative life coaching.
Fastest growing jobs require solving labor shortages via AI, not traditional hiring.
